# Pos Vat Tree

% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!
% !! This file is generated by oca-gen-addon-readme !!
% !! changes will be overwritten.                   !!
% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!

{{ badge1 }} {{ badge2 }} {{ badge3 }} {{ badge4 }} {{ badge5 }}

This module extends the functionality of Point of Sale (point_of_sale) to display the partner vat on the customer tree/list view.

```{image} https://raw.githubusercontent.com/OCA/pos/14.0/pos_customer_tree_view_vat/static/description/printscreen.png
:width: 800 px
```
